Container.Name: teslamateapi
Container.Overview: TeslaMateApi is a RESTful API to get data collected by the self-hosted Tesla data logger TeslaMate in JSON format. It connects to TeslaMate's PostgreSQL database and MQTT broker to expose vehicle data, trips, charges, battery health, and more through a clean REST interface.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: tesla teslamate ev electric vehicle api car
Container.Requires: Requires a running TeslaMate instance with its PostgreSQL database and MQTT broker accessible from this container.

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: HTTP port for the TeslaMateApi REST interface.

Config.Name: DATABASE_HOST
Config.Description: Hostname or IP of the PostgreSQL server running TeslaMate's database.

Config.Name: DATABASE_PORT
Config.Description: PostgreSQL port.

Config.Name: DATABASE_USER
Config.Description: PostgreSQL username.

Config.Name: DATABASE_PASS
Config.Description: PostgreSQL password.

Config.Name: DATABASE_NAME
Config.Description: PostgreSQL database name.

Config.Name: ENCRYPTION_KEY
Config.Description: Encryption key used internally by the API. Must be set (no default).

Config.Name: MQTT_HOST
Config.Description: Hostname or IP of the MQTT broker used by TeslaMate.

Config.Name: MQTT_PORT
Config.Description: MQTT broker port (default 1883, or 8883 for TLS).

Config.Name: TZ
Config.Description: Timezone for the container.

Config.Name: MQTT_TLS
Config.Description: Enable TLS for MQTT connection.

Config.Name: MQTT_USERNAME
Config.Description: MQTT broker username (if authentication is required).

Config.Name: MQTT_PASSWORD
Config.Description: MQTT broker password.

Config.Name: MQTT_NAMESPACE
Config.Description: MQTT namespace (if TeslaMate uses a custom namespace).

Config.Name: DISABLE_MQTT
Config.Description: Disable MQTT connection entirely (only database will be used).

Config.Name: TESLAMATE_HOST
Config.Description: Hostname or IP of the TeslaMate instance (needed for commands).

Config.Name: TESLAMATE_PORT
Config.Description: TeslaMate web interface port.

Config.Name: TESLAMATE_SSL
Config.Description: Use HTTPS for TeslaMate connection.

Config.Name: DATABASE_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Database connection timeout in milliseconds.

Config.Name: DATABASE_SSL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL SSL mode (disable, require, verify-ca, verify-full).

Config.Name: API_TOKEN
Config.Description: API token for protected endpoints (minimum 32 characters). Leave empty to disable.

Config.Name: API_TOKEN_DISABLE
Config.Description: Disable API token requirement for all endpoints.

Config.Name: ENABLE_COMMANDS
Config.Description: Enable vehicle command endpoints (wake, doors, climate, etc.).

Config.Name: COMMANDS_ALL
Config.Description: Enable all command groups at once.

Config.Name: DEBUG_MODE
Config.Description: Enable debug logging.
